Protein names: Histone-lysine N-methyltransferase, H3 lysine-9 specific SUVH1 (EC 2.1.1.-) (EC 2.1.1.368) (EC 2.1.1.369) (Histone H3-K9 methyltransferase 1) (H3-K9-HMTase 1) (NtSet1) (Suppressor of variegation 3-9 homolog protein 1) (Su(var)3-9 homolog protein 1)
Protein families: Class V-like SAM-binding methyltransferase superfamily, Histone-lysine methyltransferase family, Suvar3-9 subfamily
Domain [CC]: DOMAIN: The SET domain is required for methyltransferase activity and ectopic effect on plant growth.; DOMAIN: In the pre-SET domain, Cys residues bind 3 zinc ions that are arranged in a triangular cluster; some of these Cys residues contribute to the binding of two zinc ions within the cluster. {ECO:0000250}.
Sequence similarities: SIMILARITY: Belongs to the class V-like SAM-binding methyltransferase superfamily. Histone-lysine methyltransferase family. Suvar3-9 subfamily. {ECO:0000255|PROSITE-ProRule:PRU00908}.
Catalytic activity: CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=N(6)-methyl-L-lysyl(27)-[histone H3] + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = N(6),N(6)-dimethyl-L-lysyl(27)-[histone H3] + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:60300, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:15539, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:15544, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:61929, ChEBI:CHEBI:61976; Evidence={ECO:0000255|PROSITE-ProRule:PRU00908, ECO:0000305|PubMed:15546353}; CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=L-lysyl(9)-[histone H3] + 2 S-adenosyl-L-methionine = N(6),N(6)-dimethyl-L-lysyl(9)-[histone H3] + 2 S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + 2 H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:64444, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:15541, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:15546, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:29969, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:61976; EC=2.1.1.368; Evidence={ECO:0000255|PROSITE-ProRule:PRU00908, ECO:0000305|PubMed:15546353, ECO:0000305|PubMed:15574848}; CATALYTIC ACTIVITY: Reaction=L-lysyl(27)-[histone H3] + S-adenosyl-L-methionine = N(6)-methyl-L-lysyl(27)-[histone H3] + S-adenosyl-L-homocysteine + H(+); Xref=Rhea:RHEA:60296, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:15544, Rhea:RHEA-COMP:15548, ChEBI:CHEBI:15378, ChEBI:CHEBI:29969, ChEBI:CHEBI:57856, ChEBI:CHEBI:59789, ChEBI:CHEBI:61929; EC=2.1.1.369; Evidence={ECO:0000305|PubMed:15546353};
Function [CC]: FUNCTION: Histone methyltransferase. Methylates in vitro both 'Lys-9' and 'Lys-27' of histone H3. Required for in vivo dimethylation of 'Lys-9'. H3 'Lys-9' methylation represents a specific tag for epigenetic control for plant development and transcriptional repression. {ECO:0000269|PubMed:15546353, ECO:0000269|PubMed:15574848}.
